name: 900ct LED High Density Champagne Metal Christmas Hanging Wreath Twinkling Dewdrop Lights Warm White - Wondershop™
description:
Bring festive sparkle to your home with these LED High Density Champagne-Metal Wreath Christmas Novelty Silhouette Lights with White Color Light Bulbs from Wondershop™. This novelty silhouette light is designed in the shape of an open-wire wreath in a champagne hue, wrapped around in a clear wire adorned with 900 white LED bulbs for a dazzling look. Hang it anywhere inside or outside your home wherever you want to infuse a little extra illumination and holiday magic.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
